thread.section_title: Biden Seemed to Be Sending a Message During Friendly Oval Office Meeting With Trump – Twitchy
thread.title: Take Heart, Florida Woman Pam Bondi was Made in 'The Swamp' and is Ready to Take on DC
thread.title_full: Take Heart, Florida Woman Pam Bondi was Made in 'The Swamp' and is Ready to Take on DC

author: justmindy
title: Take Heart, Florida Woman Pam Bondi was Made in 'The Swamp' and is Ready to Take on DC
text:
To be fully transparent, I am a proud Native Floridian, so I consider most Floridians to be be made from excellent stock. Many conservatives were disappointed after Matt Gaetz dropped out of AG contention. President Trump chose 'Florida Woman' Pam Bondi to take his place. I want to assure all of our kind readers, Bondi is an excellent choice. She is loyal to President Trump and will be sure to advance his agenda.
Trump replaced a Florida man with a Florida woman— Arynne Wexler (@ArynneWexler)
So far we have
President: Florida
Chief of Staff: Florida
Secretary of State: Florida
National Security Advisor: Florida
Attorney General: Florida
We’re actually going to Make America Florida 🇺🇸
[November 22, 2024]
It's so beautiful.
Rather poetic, I'd say!— Matt Gaetz (@mattgaetz)
[https://t.co/X83cQAd8RX] [November 22, 2024]
.— Matt Gaetz (@mattgaetz)
[@PamBondi]is a stellar selection by President Trump for Attorney General.
Pam and I worked closely together when she was Florida’s Attorney General and I chaired Criminal Justice in the state house.
She’s a proven litigator, an inspiring leader and a champion for all…
[https://t.co/K86sK7WkPf] [November 22, 2024]
Matt Gaetz offered his seal of approval. That was very magnanimous.
Future Attorney General Pam Bondi masterfully defended President Trump at the sham impeachment trial and exposed the fact that Hunter & Joe Biden took bribes from Ukraine.— George (@BehizyTweets)
"Hunter Biden is paid $83,000 a month to sit on that board with no experience in energy, no experience in…
[pic.twitter.com/TQIQ7fXomT] [November 22, 2024]
Bondi exhibited her litigating skills when she represented President Trump during a sham impeachment 'trial'. She is a talented litigator and ready to take on the Deep State.
Pam Bondi is a huge loyalist to Trump. Supported the voter fraud investigations in 2020, was part of his impeachment defense, and served on the America First Policy Institute as a lawyer supporting election integrity lawsuits.— Gaius Julius Caesar (@16dalesdeadbug)
Solid pick
[pic.twitter.com/cm7kmoqBDV] [November 21, 2024]
She also graduated from the University of Florida. If you want someone who can deal with the swamp, choose the fighter who was made in 'The Swamp'. It doesn't get any better than that.
Here is Pam Bondi being a Bad A$$ during the sham impeachment trial of Trump.— Still🏝️Roaming (@roaming_rn)
She is exposing Hunter and Joe Ukraine bribes:
"Hunter Biden is paid $83,000 a month to sit on that board with no experience in energy, no experience in the Ukraine, doesn't speak the language..."
[pic.twitter.com/0YpEnBLf2p] [November 22, 2024]
YES!!!! Pam Bondi is an amazing choice.— Jack Heretik (@JackHeretik)
I had the honor of working with her during President Trump's nonsensical impeachment trial in 2020. She was wonderful to work with and a brilliant lawyer!
[https://t.co/CvOjBgEAzR] [November 22, 2024]
Pam Bondi is amazing— Meredith Marshall (@MeredithMarsha1)
she knows where the bodies lie
She was Trump's Impeachment attorney
Cue the Jaws movie music
[November 22, 2024]
The Trump Administration and Americans are in excellent hands with Bondi. While some are still very disappointed about losing Gaetz in the position, take heart.
